example_reviews: Tried for about half and hour. Would ask questions then disregard all my responses by repeatedly asking me if I wanted to try a grounding or some other technique. I get blown off enough by the living. Don't need ignored by an app. lol. I actually wasn't expecting much from it, just wanted to give it a try out of curiosity. Now I know.
helps me get through with my anxiety attacks especially when everyone is asleep already
Such a good instrument to mindfulness and journaling the day
